message:
feat(runtime): expand runtime_compat surface contract with broadcast/oneshot/notify (15->18)

Add 3 new SurfaceContractEntry items (broadcast, oneshot, notify) with
Keep disposition to the runtime compatibility layer. Add corresponding
SurfaceApiEntry items to the surface guard. Update count assertions
from 15 to 18. Add tokio confinement pattern tests and
production_channel_surfaces_route_through_runtime_compat assertion.
Tighten e2e migration quality gate and integration validation to
require 100% compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
